name: VGA Controller (640×480 @ 60 Hz)
description: Standard 640×480 @ 60 Hz VGA sync generator. Outputs hsync, vsync, horizontal/vertical pixel counters, and display_on flag. Connect pixel RGB data when display_on is high.
author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors
usage_note: Requires exactly 25.175 MHz pixel clock. On most FPGAs use a PLL/MMCM to derive this from your system clock. Drive RGB outputs to 0 when display_on=0.
